creator: freebsd@linepoint.com
text:
Update of haproxy from v1.4.11 to v1.4.13

This replaces PR:ports/155383 (v1.4.11 to v1.4.12) which hasn't been committed yet.

V1.4.13 includes a bugfix that was introduced in v1.4.12 that can break working configurations.

Fix: PORTNAME=      haproxy
-PORTVERSION=   1.4.11
+PORTVERSION=   1.4.13
 CATEGORIES=    net www
 MASTER_SITES=  http://haproxy.1wt.eu/download/1.4/src/
